introSection: Surf Coaster Leviathan (Japanese: サーフコースター リヴァイアサン) is a steel roller coaster located at Sea Paradise in Kanazawa, Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan. The ride extends over water. It was formerly known as just "Surf Coaster" until 2014. For 2014, when the ride was renamed.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: White track with blue rails and white supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride recieved new TOGO build trains in 2014, these new trains where dubbed BLADE.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Surf Coaster Leviathan on the parks website (Japanese)

fullText:
Surf Coaster Leviathan (Japanese: サーフコースター リヴァイアサン) is a steel roller coaster located at Sea Paradise in Kanazawa, Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan. The ride extends over water. It was formerly known as just "Surf Coaster" until 2014. For 2014, when the ride was renamed.



White track with blue rails and white supports.

The ride recieved new TOGO build trains in 2014, these new trains where dubbed BLADE.


 * Surf Coaster Leviathan on the parks website (Japanese)
